description_long: This lantern features a cylindrical central body with a translucent yellow enclosure, likely designed to diffuse light evenly. The top and bottom sections are capped with robust, metallic-looking structures that have angular cutouts, possibly for ventilation or aesthetic appeal. The metallic caps are silver-gray and appear to be made of a durable material, providing structural support and protection. The central yellow section is likely made of glass or plastic, allowing light to emit from within. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or building entrances. There are no visible decorative motifs, and the form is streamlined for practical outdoor use.
description: A modern cylindrical lantern with a yellow translucent body and silver-gray metallic caps, designed for urban outdoor lighting. The design is sleek and functional, with angular cutouts on the top and bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical yellow enclosure and symmetrical metallic caps with angular cutouts.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the even symmetry and the translucent central section.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the same metallic and translucent features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent cylindrical form and metallic cap details.
